name: Caribbean Reef Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle salt and pepper over washed and dried chicken halves. Set aside.
2. In a small bowl, mix together brown sugar, 2 tablespoons dark rum, lime juice, lemon pepper, ginger, ground cloves, cinnamon, garlic powder, and hot pepper sauce to make Caribbean paste. Set aside.
3. Place the chicken pieces, skin side up, in a large shallow baking pan.
4. Rub the Caribbean paste evenly over the chicken pieces.
5. Bake at 400°F for 45 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender.
6. In a blender, mix mango chutney and the remaining 2 tablespoons dark rum to create a smooth mixture.
7. Spoon the chutney mixture over the chicken pieces and bake for an additional 3 minutes or until the chutney is warm.
8. Arrange the cooked chicken on a serving platter. Garnish with lemon slices, lime slices, and parsley.
